fact: I still hate vegetables and I'm almost 21 years old.
My biggest pet peeve is loud chewing. It really gets to me.
I plan on running a half marathon soon and it will be my whole personality for a bit.
One of my top artists for 3 years in a row was Michael Jackson.
I only recently learnt to tell the difference between niece and nephew. I managed to avoid saying the words for 19 years.
I enjoy reading in my spare time and hope to write a novel one day.
I have an obsession with paragliding and would love to try it one day.
I am very shy and tend to overthink a lot, but I try to put myself out there.
Pineapple absolutely belongs on pizza, and I will die on this hill.
